title: Child of Manhattan
writer: Gertrude Purcell, Maurine Dallas Watkins, Preston Sturges
actors: Nancy Carroll, John Boles, Buck Jones
plot: Paul Vanderkill is extraordinarily wealthy because his grandfather happened to buy farmland in what was to become Midtown Manhattan. The Loveland Dance Hall is one of the tenants of the Vanderkill estates. To reassure his aunt Sop...
